sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.7.8: Fix sticky room header darkening by using solid header color.
  • 1.7.7: Force white commission row and improve built-in update refresh.
  • 1.7.6: Restore white notes row and original dark room header row; keep commission row white.
